meta.reviewPolicy: Repository facts are collected from public GitHub metadata. Deployment readiness, go-to-market fit and licence classifications are editorial inputs reviewed against the linked repository and official website.

editorialEvidence.gtmFit: Supports a substantial go-to-market workflow and replaces part of Typeform, Intercom chat flows.
editorialEvidence.licence: Source available: Code can be read, but added restrictions prevent strict open-source classification.

tools.name: GEO/AEO Tracker
tools.description: Early local-first tracker for brand visibility in AI answers.
tools.repositoryDescription: Open-source, local-first AI visibility intelligence dashboard. Track your brand across 6 AI models.
tools.licenceMeaning: No verified licence grant was found.

editorialEvidence.deployment: Self-hosting is possible, but the operating path is early, incomplete or aimed primarily at developers.
editorialEvidence.gtmFit: Directly supports a central sales, marketing or customer workflow and replaces Profound, Scrunch AI, Peec AI.
editorialEvidence.licence: Unlicensed / unclear: No verified licence grant was found.
